raw.message: Start the school year strong with math practice that’s fun—and effective!

hook.summary: A toggle switch transitions from a traditional abacus to a magical game world.
hook.visual_action: An abacus is shown with a toggle switch that slides to the Prodigy logo, sparking a visual explosion into gameplay.
hook.text_overlay: HEY PARENTS! This school year, slide math out of the past

scene_flow: Intro shows a 3D abacus with a 'Hey Parents!' message.
A toggle switch slides to the Prodigy logo, triggering a magical transition.
Gameplay footage displays a turn-based monster battle with math-based mechanics.
The ad concludes with the brand logo and a call to action.
on_screen_text: This school year, slide math out of the past
And into fun mode with Prodigy.
audience_proxy: Parents of school-aged children seeking educational games to make math practice more engaging.
